hypothesis: More BPE vocab → fewer tokens per raw byte → lower val_bpb at same CE.
notes: NOT RUN in this sandbox (no torch/CUDA, no sentencepiece). HF willdepueoai/parameter-golf lists only fineweb10B_sp1024. Build SP2048: pip install sentencepiece huggingface_hub; python3 data/download_hf_docs_and_tokenize.py --output-root ./data/sp2048_build --tokenizer-config data/tokenizer_specs_sp2048.json --tokenizer-train-docs 5000000 [--proxy-max-docs 600000 for fast proxy]. Then: ln -sfn sp2048_build/datasets/fineweb10B_sp2048 data/datasets/; cp sp2048_build/tokenizers/fineweb_2048_bpe.model data/tokenizers/. Run: ITERATIONS=200 VAL_LOSS_EVERY=0 VAL_BATCH_SIZE=8192 python3 train_gpt_exp001.py. Check final_model.int8.ptz <= 16MB.
